evaluation.overall_comment:
The translation fails to meet basic professional standards due to critical structural defects. The pervasive and systematic mixing of French and Spanish throughout the text severely compromises readability, fluency, and technical clarity. Multiple grammatical errors, typos, and repeated formatting glitches further degrade the output. Despite containing the underlying technical concepts, the relentless language interference makes the text largely incomprehensible and unusable for its intended audience. It falls strictly into the critical error category per the provided guidelines and requires a complete rewrite to maintain target-language consistency and professional quality.
